Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\LEGION\\Downloads\\DACN\\fe-ecomerce-shop" && python3 << 'EOF'
import json

# Load both specs
with open\('openapi.json', 'r'\) as f:
    new_spec = json.load\(f\)
with open\('openapi.json.old', 'r'\) as f:
    old_spec = json.load\(f\)

new_schemas = new_spec.get\('components', {}\).get\('schemas', {}\)
old_schemas = old_spec.get\('components', {}\).get\('schemas', {}\)

# Check ProductEntity fields
print\("=== ProductEntity field changes ==="\)
if 'ProductEntity' in new_schemas and 'ProductEntity' in old_schemas:
    new_props = new_schemas['ProductEntity'].get\('properties', {}\).keys\(\)
    old_props = old_schemas['ProductEntity'].get\('properties', {}\).keys\(\)
    new_props_set = set\(new_props\)
    old_props_set = set\(old_props\)
    
    print\(f"REMOVED: {old_props_set - new_props_set}"\)
    print\(f"ADDED: {new_props_set - old_props_set}"\)

print\("\\n=== ProductVariantEntity field changes ==="\)
if 'ProductVariantEntity' in new_schemas and 'ProductVariantEntity' in old_schemas:
    new_props = new_schemas['ProductVariantEntity'].get\('properties', {}\).keys\(\)
    old_props = old_schemas['ProductVariantEntity'].get\('properties', {}\).keys\(\)

    old_props_set = set\(old_props\)

if 'CategoryEntity' in new_schemas and 'CategoryEntity' in old_schemas:

    print\(f"REMOVED: {old_props_set - new_props_set}"\)
    print\(f"ADDED: {new_props_set - old_props_set}"\)

print\("\\n=== AddressEntity field changes ==="\)
if 'AddressEntity' in new_schemas and 'AddressEntity' in old_schemas:
    new_props = new_schemas['AddressEntity'].get\('properties', {}\).keys\(\)
    old_props = old_schemas['AddressEntity'].get\('properties', {}\).keys\(\)

if 'DatabaseAddressDto' in new_schemas and 'DatabaseAddressDto' in old_schemas:
